title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 172.450 - Faculty
text:
172.450.  Faculty. — The College of Agriculture and the University of Missouri-Rolla herein provided for shall have each a separate and distinct faculty, whose officers and professors may be the same, in whole or in part, as the officers and professors in other colleges and departments of the university.
(RSMo 1939 § 10829) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9672; 1919 § 11569; 1909 § 11140
